name: MPPSC – IAEO, AAO and More – 06 Posts

basic_details.job_title: MPPSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 06 IAEO, AAO and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission (MPPSC) Recruitment 2026 for 06 IAEO, AAO and Assistant Director posts. Online application from 04 August 2026 to 03 September 2026.
basic_details.post_name: Internal Accounts Examiner Officer, Assistant Accounts Officer / Assistant Director (Accounts & Establishment), Assistant Director (Statistics)

selection_process: Interview (100 marks) / Written Exam + Interview (as per number of applications)
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only and send the hard copy with documents.
seo_tags: Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission IAEO
